content:
I don't have access to yesterday's activity logs, calendar, or task history. My memory only contains architectural notes and project context from previous sessions — not a record of what was done on any specific date.

To find yesterday's work, you could check:
- `git log --since="2026-03-09" --until="2026-03-10" --oneline` for commits
- Your task manager or notes app
- The CHANGELOG for recent entries

Yesterday (2026-03-10) was a very significant day with two major commits:

---

**`v0.8 initial implementation`** (06:25)
A massive release adding a full task/goal execution system:
- **New Google Chat channel** — `GcpAuthService`, `GoogleChatChannel`, full REST client, JWT verifier
- **Task & Goal system** — `Task`, `Goal`, `TaskService`, `GoalService`, `TaskRepository`, `GoalRepository` with full SQLite persistence
- **Task execution pipeline** — `TaskExecutor`, `WorktreeManager`, `MergeExecutor`, `DiffGenerator`, `ArtifactCollector`, `AgentObserver`
- **Harness pool** — `HarnessPool` for managing Claude Code harness instances
- **Scheduled task runner** — `ScheduledTaskRunner` for cron/interval-based task execution
- **New API routes** — `/tasks`, `/goals`, `/agents`, task SSE streaming, Google Chat webhook
- **New web pages** — Tasks list & detail pages, full web UI overhaul with page registry
- **Config system expansion** — `DartclawConfig`, `ScheduledTaskDefinition`, `ConfigSerializer`
- **`TurnRunner`** split out from `TurnManager` (major refactor)
- ~19,900 lines added across 172 files

---

**`Review/gap fixes`** (09:27)
Post-implementation polish pass:
- `ContainerTaskFailureSubscriber` — new failure handling subscriber with tests
- `TaskExecutor` and `WorktreeManager` refactored/simplified
- `MergeExecutor` simplified
- Task detail template enhancements
- `ScheduledTaskRunner` fixes + test updates
- `app.js` UI improvements
- New template tests (`task_detail`, `tasks`)
- Removed `CLAUDE.md` and guidelines docs (moved/cleaned up)

---

In short: **v0.8 landed**, introducing a comprehensive agentic task execution system with Google Chat support, goal tracking, worktree-based code execution, and a full web UI for managing tasks.
